libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Apply the same native-test runtime system properties for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 that are already used for 5.0.0: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1; no external service, Docker image, or extra Maven dependency is required for ordinary WebClient coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2-specific WebClient features depend on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2, but they are not necessary for broad WebClient coverage.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative for whether the Netty system properties are sufficient on the configured JDK 25 native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 still resolves through Vert.x Core to Netty 4.2.x, and the existing 5.0.0 test already required Netty/JDK 25 native runtime system properties. The 5.0.1 failure is consistent with those properties not being applied to the newer version.
